query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS exchange_rates (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  baseCurrency VARCHAR(3) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'USD',
  targetCurrency VARCHAR(3) NOT NULL,
  rate DECIMAL(18, 8) NOT NULL,
  source VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT 'exchangerate-api.com',
  fetchedAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX currency_pair_idx (baseCurrency, targetCurrency),
  INDEX fetched_at_idx (fetchedAt)
)
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3MFojkLuMTYkad4.root --database VvJGXt6mJVC6petxtZ2P78 --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS exchange_rates (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  baseCurrency VARCHAR(3) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'USD',
  targetCurrency VARCHAR(3) NOT NULL,
  rate DECIMAL(18, 8) NOT NULL,
  source VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT 'exchangerate-api.com',
  fetchedAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  createdAt TIMESTAMP NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  INDEX currency_pair_idx (baseCurrency, targetCurrency),
  INDEX fetched_at_idx (fetchedAt)
)
